summary.goodPoints: (자동 생성 실패) 기본 오답 리스트를 우선 제공합니다.
summary.badPoints: (자동 생성 실패) 상세 해설 분석을 불러오지 못했습니다.
summary.priority: 오답 문항의 정답 근거 문장을 먼저 확인하고 재검토하세요.

wrongAnswers.question: When James worked in the office, his job was sedentary. In contrast, when he became a reporter, he was almost away from his desk.
wrongAnswers.passage: When James worked in the office, his job was sedentary. In contrast, when he became a reporter, he was almost away from his desk.
wrongAnswers.explanation: 자동 해설 생성 실패로 기본 오답 데이터만 표시합니다.

wrongAnswers.question: 문맥상 밑줄 친 'agitated'의 의미로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
wrongAnswers.passage: When Marcus entered the classroom, he felt calm. However, as soon as he opened the test paper, he began to feel agitated.
wrongAnswers.explanation: 자동 해설 생성 실패로 기본 오답 데이터만 표시합니다.
